title: Authentication Flow (OAuth2/JWT)
shortDescription: Scaffold a complete authentication flow with login, signup, token management, and protected routes.
jobsToBeDone: Prototype a working auth system for a new product
Set up OAuth2 social login with email/password fallback
Create protected route middleware and session management

inputs.label: Auth Method
inputs.example: JWT with refresh tokens + Google OAuth2 social login

inputs.label: Framework & Stack
inputs.example: Express.js with TypeScript, PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM, React frontend

inputs.label: User Model Fields
inputs.example: email, name, avatarUrl, role (admin/member/viewer), organizationId, lastLoginAt

inputs.label: Specific Requirements
inputs.example: Email verification required, password reset flow, rate limiting on login (5 attempts/15 min), refresh token rotation, RBAC middleware for admin routes
